manifest.description.message: Switch between open windows. Type 'w ' to list and filter windows.

settings.description.message: Quickly switch between open windows. Type the trigger keyword to list and filter windows.

settings.trigger.description.message: Type this in the floating window to activate window search. (A trailing space is added automatically.)

settings.trigger.error_empty.description: Validation error when the trigger field is blank

settings.show_icons.label.description: Toggle: extract and show app icons

settings.show_icons.description.message: Extract and display application icons next to each window. Disable for faster results on slower machines.

settings.hide_minimized.description.message: Exclude minimized windows from the list.
